description_long: This stereo sound system consists of two wooden speaker cabinets with a rich, reddish-brown wood grain finish and black speaker cones. Each cabinet stands on four angled wooden legs, giving the system a mid-century modern aesthetic. The front of the speakers features multiple circular speaker drivers, including a large woofer and smaller tweeters, all set in a glossy black baffle. The rear panels display a variety of control knobs, switches, and input/output ports, as well as ventilation grilles for heat dissipation. A separate, matching wooden stand or component is positioned nearby, possibly for supporting additional equipment or as part of the system's modular design. The overall look is both retro and functional, suitable for placement in urban interiors, garages, or stylish public spaces.
description: A pair of mid-century modern wooden stereo speakers with black drivers, angled legs, and a matching accessory stand. The system features visible control panels and multiple input/output ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the speaker drivers and the matching wooden stand to the right.
description_view_1: Angled front view highlighting the glossy black speaker cones and the stand in the foreground.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the control panels, input/output ports, and ventilation grilles on the back of the speakers.
description_view_3: Direct rear view focusing on the detailed control panels and the back of the wooden cabinets.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grilles are smooth and glossy black, with no visible mesh or perforation pattern, allowing the speaker drivers to be clearly seen.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panels are located on the rear of each speaker, featuring multiple rotary knobs, toggle switches, and input/output ports arranged in a rectangular layout with some labeling visible.
